pricing.name: Pricing

features.title: Everything You Need to Build with AI
features.subtitle: Each island is a dedicated workspace where you and your AI team bring ideas to life
features.projectsDesc: Every project gets its own island — a focused workspace with tasks, notes, and AI-powered tools. Keep your ideas organized and your builds on track.
features.projectsBullet2: Notes editor for ideas and docs
features.projectsBullet3: MVP link to share your work
features.collabDesc: Create multiple AI personas with custom roles — a coder, a designer, a strategist. Each one has its own system prompt and responds exactly how you configure it.
features.feedDesc: Hand conversations between AI personas seamlessly. Your engineer specs the idea, your programmer codes it — all in one shared thread with full context.
features.agentsDesc: Plug in your own OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, or Gemini API keys. You choose the model, you own the data. Keys stay encrypted and private.
features.notesDesc: Write project notes, documentation, and design specs right inside your island. Everything stays in context for your AI to reference.

howItWorks.title: From Zero to AI-Powered Project in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting started takes less than 2 minutes
howItWorks.step1Desc: Name your project, add a description, and your workspace is ready. Each island comes with tasks, notes, and a full AI workspace.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Create custom AI assistants with specific roles and instructions. Give each one a name, a model, and a unique system prompt.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Start chatting with one AI, then seamlessly switch to another. Each persona reads the full conversation history and picks up in its own role.
howItWorks.step3Msg1: Plan the architecture for a task app
howItWorks.step3Msg3: Based on that plan, here is the code...

guide.title: Your First Island in 6 Steps
guide.subtitle: A complete walkthrough from signup to your first AI-powered conversation
guide.step1Desc: Click Get Started and you're in. No account needed — everything runs locally in your browser.
guide.step2Desc: Go to Settings and add your OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, or Gemini key. Keys are stored locally in your browser.
guide.step3Desc: Hit the + button on the dashboard. Give your project a name and description.
guide.step4Desc: Open your island's AI Workspace tab. Create personas with custom names, roles, and system prompts.
guide.step5Desc: Open the AI Chat tab and start a conversation. Switch between personas mid-chat to get different perspectives.
guide.step6Desc: Use tasks to track progress, notes for documentation, and the overview to share your MVP link with the world.

why.title: Built for Builders Who Want Control
why.privacyDesc: Your API keys are stored locally in your browser and never leave your device. No servers, no databases — you own your data completely.
why.speedDesc: No complicated setup. Just run `npm install`, add a key, and start building. Your first AI conversation is 2 minutes away.
why.multiDesc: OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Gemini — use any model you want. Switch between providers per persona, per conversation.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready

cta.title: Ready to Set Sail?
cta.description: Start building with AI right now — no signup, no setup, just your ideas and your API key.

footer.tagline: Where humans and AI build together.

aiWorkspace.title: AI Assistant
aiWorkspace.configDesc: Customize how the AI behaves on this island by giving it a specific persona or instructions.
aiWorkspace.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g. You are a harsh code reviewer. Only reply in pirate speak...
aiWorkspace.noProfiles: No AI Profiles created yet. Create one to give this island some life!
aiWorkspace.goToWorkspace: Go to AI Workspace to create one!
aiWorkspace.noKeyPlaceholder: Add an API key in Settings to enable AI
aiWorkspace.welcome: Hello! I'm your island's AI. I can see your project's tasks, notes, and description. I will follow your custom instructions!
aiWorkspace.notConnected: AI not connected — add an API key
aiWorkspace.noKeyMessage: No API key configured. Go to Settings to add your OpenAI or Anthropic key, then your AI will be able to see and manage your island!

settings.title: API Keys
settings.subtitle: Connect your AI to your islands
settings.addKeyDesc: Add your OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, or Gemini API key. Choose where to store it.
settings.label: Label
settings.noKeys: No API keys yet. Add one to enable AI on your islands!
settings.deleteKeyConfirm: Delete this API key? Your AI will stop working on islands using this key.
settings.securityNote: 🔒 Your API keys are stored locally in your browser. They never leave your device. Only you can see and manage your keys.
settings.storageLocalDesc: Keys are stored only in your browser. They never leave your device.
settings.localSecurityNote: Your key stays on this device only. If you clear browser data, you will need to re-enter it.
